articles.title: MBTA video shows man throwing ‘temper tantrum’ and blocking traffic after missing bus
articles.description:
The man who blocked the bus is now facing charges, police say, along with a passenger they say brandished a knife.

The post MBTA video shows man throwing ‘temper tantrum’ and blocking traffic after missing bus appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Man blocked traffic after missing an MBTA bus, causing disruption.
Police charged the man and a passenger who brandished a knife.
Incident highlights safety concerns for Boston commuters using public transport.

articles.title: Mansfield becomes first town in Mass. to pass near-total ban on data centers
articles.description:
Voters approved a sweeping zoning amendment to limit where and how data centers can operate in Mansfield.

The post Mansfield becomes first town in Mass. to pass near-total ban on data centers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mansfield voters approved a zoning amendment banning data centers on May 13, 2026.
This makes Mansfield the first town in Massachusetts to implement such a ban.
Residents may see reduced environmental impact and increased property value due to limited data center operations.

articles.title: His truck was stolen from a Logan Airport garage. Massport initially refused a parking refund.
articles.description:

summary: Brendon Byrnes' truck was stolen from Logan Airport garage after he paid $276 for six days.
Massport initially denied Byrnes a parking refund despite the theft occurring on May 13.
This incident raises concerns about security and liability for Boston travelers using Logan Airport.
